name: Forced Authentication via Responder or NBNS Poisoning
description: Detects tools like Responder used to capture forced authentication credentials
query:
// Detect forced authentication tools
// Trigger on Responder, Inveigh, or NTLM relay patterns
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(Responder\.py|Inveigh|ntlmrelay|PetitPotam|SpoolSample|PrinterBug|Coercer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
